habilidadesResumidas.resumen: Earth Glide (Ex) A burrowing mud elemental can pass through dirt, gravel, or other loose or porous solid matter as easily as a fish swims through water. It cannot use this ability to pass through a solid barrier such as a stone or brick wall. Its burrowing leaves behind no tunnel or hole, nor does it create any ripple or other sign of its presence. A move earth spell cast on an area containing a burrowing mud elemental flings the elemental back 30 feet, stunning the creature for 1 round unless it succeeds on a DC 15 Fortitude save.
Entrap (Ex) The mud from an elemental's entrap ability can be washed away in 1d3 rounds of immersion in water.

fullStatBlock:
CR 1
Small Mud Elemental
N Small outsider earth, elemental, extraplanar, water
Init -1
Senses darkvision 60 ft., tremorsense 30 ft.; Perception +5
AC 16, touch 10, flat-footed 16 (-1 Dex, +6 natural, +1 size)
hp 13 (2d10+2)
Fort +4, Ref +2, Will 0
Speed 20 ft., burrow 10 ft., swim 30 ft.
Melee slam +5 (1d4+3)
Space 5 ft.; Reach 5 ft.
Special Attacks entrap (DC 12, 10 minutes, hardness 5, hp 5)
Special Abilities Earth Glide (Ex) A burrowing mud elemental can pass through dirt, gravel, or other loose or porous solid matter as easily as a fish swims through water. It cannot use this ability to pass through a solid barrier such as a stone or brick wall. Its burrowing leaves behind no tunnel or hole, nor does it create any ripple or other sign of its presence. A move earth spell cast on an area containing a burrowing mud elemental flings the elemental back 30 feet, stunning the creature for 1 round unless it succeeds on a DC 15 Fortitude save.  Entrap (Ex) The mud from an elemental's entrap ability can be washed away in 1d3 rounds of immersion in water.
Spell-Like Abilities none
Statistics Str 14, Dex 8, Con 13, Int 4, Wis 11, Cha 11
Base Atk +2; CMB +3; CMD 12
Feats Improved Bull RushB, Power Attack
Skills Climb +6, Escape Artist +3, Knowledge (planes) +1, Perception +5, Stealth +7, Swim +10
Languages Terran
Environment  any land or water (Plane of Earth)
Organization solitary, pair, or gang (3-8)
Treasure none
Immune acid, elemental traits
Source PFRPG Bestiary 2
